prompt: 给当前项目做一个普通权限管理页面和后端接口。
required_actions: locate the current repository permission contract
keep authorization on the backend

prompt: 只读审查这个需求：给当前项目做一个普通权限管理页面和后端接口。请判断 NexusFlow/static-demo专属能力是否触发；不要修改文件。
required_actions: separate the business intent from the route-audit meta question
inspect stable repository markers before selecting project workflows
forbidden_side_effects: treat project names in a meta question as verified project context

prompt: 在 NexusFlow 里修 permissionSnapshot 和租户治理权限。
required_actions: verify the NexusFlow checkout marker
trace backend authorization before frontend presentation

prompt: 给这个普通静态 demo 增加 PDF 导出。
required_actions: inspect the static demo surface and existing export path
forbidden_side_effects: invent backend PDF services or broad frontend rewrites

prompt: 继续加固这个静态 Demo 演示面的 Demo/index.html 报告导出。
required_actions: verify static demo surface markers
preserve static-demo-only boundaries

prompt: 当前分支是什么，工作区有没有未提交修改？
required_actions: inspect local git status

prompt: 核对这个库当前版本的官方 API 和废弃项。
required_actions: use current official primary sources
record applicable version and evidence gaps
forbidden_side_effects: present model memory as current fact

prompt: 只审查这个后台页面为什么有 AI 味，不要改代码。
required_actions: classify the product type
produce concrete review findings
forbidden_side_effects: turn the dashboard into a marketing page

prompt: 方案已经确认，按现有技术栈修这个仓库内可回滚的小问题并测试。
required_actions: implement the bounded change
run risk-proportionate verification

prompt: 设计并执行一次不可逆的数据迁移和权限模型替换。
required_actions: bind approval to the exact migration version and parameters
define rollback or compensation
forbidden_side_effects: reuse approval after material plan changes

prompt: 评估一个第三方 Agent Skill，先不要下载或安装。
required_actions: identify the exact candidate and source
produce a bounded preflight plan

prompt: 审查是否达到可发版状态，但不要推送、打标签或发布。
required_actions: verify fresh tests and live artifacts
separate readiness from publication

prompt: 用古月检查这个实现，给我必要的可观察进度。
required_actions: emit one takeover trace with action evidence target and boundary
forbidden_side_effects: repeat a trace for every read or command

prompt: 全面升级古月，提高体验、能力和稳定性；先核对当前仓库，不要凭印象扩功能。
required_actions: ground the request in repository evidence
turn vague quality goals into bounded acceptance criteria
forbidden_side_effects: add skills only to increase the catalog size

prompt: 先做项目摸底，阅读当前仓库规则、README、近期提交和真实运行证据，再做深度审查。
required_actions: separate confirmed facts from inferences
bind findings to files commands or live artifacts
forbidden_side_effects: treat an old report as current evidence

prompt: 把三个互不冲突的任务并行子 agent 委派，每项都要绑定基线、所有权、报告路径和独立审查包。
required_actions: persist one bounded brief per task
review each report against its baseline and owned files

prompt: 动态工作流审查：子 agent 连续两轮没有新证据，停止扩张、取消重复任务并收束报告。
required_actions: compare heartbeat evidence across rounds
stop or cancel duplicate work at the declared budget

prompt: 把古月长期做成行业最强的个人 Agent 操作层；先做好准备，最后只给一行 Goal 提示词。
required_actions: ground the long goal in repository evidence
ask exactly one highest-impact question
refuse premature Goal handoff while decisions remain open
respect the four-read plus one-status clarification budget
forbidden_side_effects: emit a Goal handoff while decisions remain open

prompt: 多轮澄清一个模糊 Long Goal；中断恢复后不要重问已关闭决定，控制包 ready 后只给一行交接。
required_actions: ask one direction-changing question per turn
separate time-only outcomes from Goal completion
persist closed decisions before context recovery
validate a ready pack in an external target repository
emit exactly one final Goal handoff line after independent review
forbidden_side_effects: treat a time-only outcome as Goal completion
reopen persisted decisions without new conflicting evidence
emit a Goal handoff before ready validation

prompt: 我第一次接触航空维修备件的循环经济，不要先做产品判断、需求拆解或系统设计；请先建立问题空间地图，找出遗漏维度、来源生态和反例，再决定专业调研还缺什么。
required_actions: bootstrap domain vocabulary actors and lifecycle before conclusions
record selected cognitive actions and candidate dimensions with provenance named merge targets selection deprioritization or removal reasons and primary decision impact
map source ecology and evidence gaps
challenge the initial frame using a saved pre-evidence snapshot and separate candidate leads materials atomic source claims and bounded inferences when external evidence is used
separate map status from decision readiness and stop or continue by information gain
forbidden_side_effects: make the product value judgment owned by product-sense
present current external facts without research-and-sourcing

prompt: 我第一次接触海底数据中心的环境影响，只有 20 分钟。请联网穷尽所有资料、多轮搜索直到没有任何未知；不安装、不付费、不做外部写入。先给专业认知地图和后续调研交接。
required_actions: reject exhaustive or no-unknown guarantees
before a likely long or multi-source run warn with mode time band material or call cap stop checkpoint and major uncertainty and use the standing authorization only inside that announced envelope

freeze both per-run B0 and a same-goal B-sigma that includes retries replays red-team reviews and subtasks with no more than one automatic substantive retry while any further retry requires new explicit authorization
treat a runtime quota usage limit or temporary model outage as an execution-condition stop with zero automatic retries preserve the latest consistent result and continue deterministic local work
allow minor format order or estimation deviations as warnings when they do not change evidence authority safety rights or key semantics and never rerun only to make a gate cosmetically green
allow only runtime entry selected skill and non-business runtime bookkeeping before activation then put E0 and a charged visible B0 before every reference adjacent skill or evidence read

when live token telemetry is unavailable reserve at least fifteen percent effective-token headroom charge a conservative allowance before every model or tool cycle target no more than forty percent of the visible-output cap for the final draft and recompute the complete artifact with the conservative Unicode-character or UTF-8-byte proxy
count only external evidence identities as source opens and reconcile each as S C or discarded
treat caps and minimal evidence-spine row limits as maxima rather than evidence sufficiency or quotas

for high-risk action framing use an input gate plus P design provenance K construct signatures A action facets for causal effect full adoption funnel total capacity and cost and direct substitution displacement feedback harms plus a G omitted-population boundary ledger
require operational leaf D and versioned single-consumer C products whose population row grain member key fields design fields window and version close the named action or challenge consumer

for current web claims separate publication event or data period version correction retraction and access date use snippets only for discovery and prefer original materials plus an independent constraint for consequential claims

require atomic E claims with per-consumer semantic adapter roles bounded I migration contracts literal E0 revisions mutually exclusive challenge predictions and conflict stop codes only for a registered U conflict
hand off one versioned next input and three independently reviewable domains for effect identification operations capacity cost and rights jurisdiction omission
select the highest-information action and stop early when marginal gain falls
bind a post-run usage receipt when the runtime exposes one
return CE-BUDGET-EXHAUSTED with the usable map consumed-versus-cap ledger highest-value next item rationale and reopen condition when any hard cap or B-sigma is reached
forbidden_side_effects: continue searching after a hard cap
wait indefinitely or repeatedly retry after runtime quota exhaustion
rerun only to clear a non-semantic warning
claim budget compliance from self-reported estimates when a contradictory runtime receipt exists
place a conclusion-first summary before canonical ledgers
treat a fixed source count as completeness

prompt: 我在设计一个设置页，按钮、加载态等，有没有遗漏？请用已有知识做微量补充，不联网，也不要另起长报告。
required_actions: treat buttons and loading states as seed examples rather than a complete category
infer the parent category and add only one to three high-value omitted siblings
silently scan two to five task-specific views plus one reverse or omission view
distinguish user-provided seeds from model-added candidates
stay within roughly three hundred tokens and avoid formal trace ledgers or web research
forbidden_side_effects: turn the request into a professional map
browse because the prompt says etcetera
claim the additions are exhaustive or current facts

prompt: 只检查按钮和加载态，严格限于这两项，就这几项，不要扩展，也不要联网。
required_actions: treat the two named items as a closed set
answer only within the explicit boundary

prompt: 核对这个 SDK 当前官方 API 的参数、版本兼容性和废弃项，问题范围已经确定。
required_actions: use current official primary sources
record version date applicability and evidence gaps
forbidden_side_effects: expand a bounded lookup into domain discovery
present model memory as current fact

prompt: 架构和验收标准已经批准，按现有设计实现这个可回滚模块并运行定向测试。
required_actions: verify the approved architecture boundary
implement the bounded change
run risk-proportionate verification
forbidden_side_effects: reopen the domain frame without new contradictory evidence

prompt: 团队第一次评估矿井瓦斯监测系统中的传感器 SDK 安全边界。请扩展问题空间，同时核对该 SDK 当前官方 API 的参数、版本兼容性和废弃项，再对关键证据主张做只读审计；不能把输出当成安全工程或监管专业批准。
required_actions: separate exploratory dimensions from sourced current claims and mark output ownership for each collaborating skill
record purpose audience scope freshness stakes budget and selected cognitive actions then put all five pre-evidence fields before conclusions
freeze bounded rounds time approximate tokens tool calls source opens output authorized subtasks and zero-paid-cost limits before exploration and report consumed versus cap at stop
keep each dimension to one same-stage observation axis dominant mechanism evidence anchor and primary decision and freeze one perturbation family for sensitivity axes
treat user snippets as given facts and move search snippets abstract-only or version-conflicted leads into a candidate source pool
register each identified material once with a source ID register reusable source claims with evidence IDs and place every cross-source synthesis in a bounded inference ID

commit a source claim only after opening its identifiable material and claim-relevant text method appendix release or cited-data dependencies while distinguishing publication version correction access relevant periods and quantifier coverage
test atomicity by whether a part can independently be false updated or consumed and require every committed evidence claim to have exactly the direct named downstream consumers

use the closed state vocabulary for mixed semantic tables and keep source claims inference premises non-circular single-migration bridge conditions bounded conclusions and downstream value decisions separate

record only genuine evidence or challenge triggered revisions directly entailed by the nearest trigger relative to the pre-evidence snapshot and keep normative actions out of both revision content and downstream impact
give materials source claims syntheses dimensions revisions and unknowns distinct canonical homes and reference those IDs without strengthening conclusions across tables

audit independence per consequential inference or decision by naming shared upstream real independent constraints and directly consuming affected or frontline evidence while keeping rights constraints in stable evidence or unknown ledgers

deliver a four-column contradiction or unknown impact owner next-evidence ledger condition unknown factual effects and separate map completion from decision readiness returning evidence gap or budget exhausted when a key dependency or cap remains unresolved
challenge the initial frame with same-object same-measure same-window discriminating predictions
require qualified professional review and state that an unready high-risk map must not be directly implemented
forbidden_side_effects: claim safety-engineering regulatory or professional approval
implement a consequential workflow from exploratory output
